movie.actors: Judy Garland, Frank Morgan, Ray Bolger, Bert Lahr
movie.director: Victor Fleming, George Cukor, Mervyn LeRoy, Norman Taurog, King Vidor
movie.plot: Dorothy Gale is swept away from a farm in Kansas to a magical land of Oz in a tornado and embarks on a quest with her new friends to see the Wizard who can help her return home to Kansas and help her friends as well.
movie.title: The Wizard of Oz
movie.writer: Noel Langley (screenplay), Florence Ryerson (screenplay), Edgar Allan Woolf (screenplay), Noel Langley (adaptation), L. Frank Baum (from the book by)
